query_title: The Hunchback of Notre Dame II

recommendations.title: Tinker Bell
recommendations.overview: Journey into the secret world of Pixie Hollow and hear Tinker Bell speak for the very first time as the astonishing story of Disney's most famous fairy is finally revealed in the all-new motion picture "Tinker Bell."

recommendations.title: Tinker Bell and the Great Fairy Rescue
recommendations.overview: During a summer stay on the mainland, Tinker Bell is accidentally discovered while investigating a little girl's fairy house. As the other fairies, led by the brash Vidia, launch a daring rescue in the middle of a fierce storm, Tink develops a specia

recommendations.title: Mickey's Once Upon a Christmas
recommendations.overview: Mickey, Minnie, and their famous friends Goofy, Donald, Daisy and Pluto gather together to reminisce about the love, magic and surprises in three wonder-filled stories of Christmas past.
recommendations.director: Alex Mann, Jun Falkenstein, Toby Shelton, Bill Speers, Bradley Raymond

recommendations.title: The Lion King 1½
recommendations.overview: Timon the meerkat and Pumbaa the warthog are best pals and the unsung heroes of the African savanna. This prequel to the smash Disney animated adventure takes you back -- way back -- before Simba's adventure began. You'll find out all about Timon and

recommendations.title: Pixie Hollow Games
recommendations.overview: Rosetta and new arrival Chloe band together to try to break the garden fairies' legendary losing streak in the Pixie Hollow Games, a sports spectacle filled with pixie pageantry, fantastic fairy events and hilarious surprises.

recommendations.title: Pocahontas II: Journey to a New World
recommendations.overview: When news of John Smith's death reaches America, Pocahontas is devastated. She sets off to London with John Rolfe, to meet with the King of England on a diplomatic mission: to create peace and respect between the two great lands. However, Governor Ra

recommendations.title: The Greatest Showman
recommendations.overview: The story of American showman P.T. Barnum, founder of the circus that became the famous traveling Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus.

recommendations.title: Presto
recommendations.overview: Dignity. Poise. Mystery. We expect nothing less from the great turn-of-the-century magician, Presto. But when Presto neglects to feed his rabbit one too many times, the magician finds he isn't the only one with a few tricks up his sleeve!

recommendations.title: Big Top Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: When Scooby and the gang hear of a werewolf plaguing a traveling circus, they go undercover as circus performers to get to the bottom.

recommendations.title: The Circus
recommendations.overview: Charlie, a wandering tramp, becomes a circus handyman - soon the star of the show - and falls in love with the circus owner's stepdaughter.
